_meta.description: Master glossary for CJK translation consistency. NOT loaded by i18next — reference only.
_meta.usage: Feed relevant entries as context when translating each namespace.

proper_nouns._note: Keep these untranslated or transliterate consistently. Never translate differently across files.

Ultimate Dominion.ja: アルティメットドミニオン

classes._note: Class names: transliterate for KO/JA (players expect katakana/English loanwords in RPGs), translate for ZH.

spells._note: Spell names: keep English feel for KO/JA (standard in Asian RPGs), translate meaning for ZH.

game_terms._note: Consistent across all namespaces. These appear in UI, descriptions, and narrative.

$GOLD._note: Never translate — it's a token symbol

tone_guide.ui: Clean, modern, minimal. Short labels. No flavor text in UI strings.
tone_guide.items: Terse, atmospheric, darkly funny. Each description should feel like it was written by someone who's been in the cave too long. The dev-themed items should keep their tech humor — translate the joke, not the words.
tone_guide.narrative: Literary. Weighty. The lore is the soul of the game. Preserve the rhythm and imagery. This is where transcreation matters most.
tone_guide.classes: Authoritative game guide tone. Practical but with personality. Stats and mechanics should be precise.
tone_guide.effects: Mechanical/terse. These are combat tooltips — clarity over flavor.

npc_voice.Tal Carden: Old, weary, dry humor. Speaks in short sentences. Knows more than he lets on.

ko.ui: 합쇼체 (formal polite) for system messages, 해요체 (casual polite) for tooltips
ko.narrative: 해라체 (literary/plain) for narration, character-appropriate for dialogue
ko.npc_tal_carden: 해요체 with occasional 반말 — weary old man who doesn't stand on ceremony

ja.ui: です/ます form for system messages, plain form for labels
ja.narrative: だ/である form for narration, character-appropriate for dialogue
ja.npc_tal_carden: Old man speech (わし/じゃ patterns) — not comedic, just weathered

zh.narrative: Literary register, allow classical Chinese phrasing where it fits
zh.npc_tal_carden: Casual, slightly archaic diction — old merchant who's seen everything
